---
title: "Rikdom Portfolio Report"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    theme: cosmo
---

```{=html}
<style>
  .rk-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(220px, 1fr));
    gap: 12px;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
  }
  .rk-card {
    border: 1px solid #d8dee9;
    border-radius: 10px;
    padding: 12px;
    background: #fbfcfe;
  }
  .rk-card h3 {
    margin: 0;
    font-size: 0.9rem;
    color: #334155;
    font-weight: 600;
  }
  .rk-metric {
    margin-top: 6px;
    font-size: 1.15rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: #0f172a;
  }
  .rk-bars {
    display: grid;
    gap: 8px;
    margin-bottom: 18px;
  }
  .rk-row {
    display: grid;
    gap: 4px;
  }
  .rk-row-head {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    gap: 10px;
    font-size: 0.92rem;
    color: #334155;
  }
  .rk-track {
    width: 100%;
    height: 10px;
    background: #e5e7eb;
    border-radius: 999px;
    overflow: hidden;
  }
  .rk-fill {
    height: 100%;
    background: #0ea5e9;
  }
  .rk-table {
    width: 100%;
    border-collapse: collapse;
  }
  .rk-table th,
  .rk-table td {
    border-bottom: 1px solid #e5e7eb;
    padding: 8px 6px;
    text-align: left;
    font-size: 0.92rem;
  }
  .rk-note {
    color: #64748b;
    font-size: 0.9rem;
    margin-top: 6px;
  }
</style>

<script src="report-data.js"></script>

<section id="rk-overview"></section>

<h2>Timeline</h2>
<section id="rk-timeline"></section>

<h2>Currency Split</h2>
<section id="rk-currency"></section>

<h2>Asset Type Breakdown</h2>
<section id="rk-asset-type"></section>

<h2>Geography</h2>
<section id="rk-geo"></section>

<h2>Top Holdings</h2>
<section id="rk-top-holdings"></section>

<script>
  (() => {
    const payload = window.RIKDOM_REPORT_DATA || {};
    const profile = payload.profile || {};
    const sections = payload.sections || {};
    const timeline = Array.isArray(sections.timeline) ? sections.timeline : [];
    const currencySplit = sections.currency_split || {};
    const assetTypeBreakdown = sections.asset_type_breakdown || {};
    const geography = sections.geography || {};
    const topHoldings = (sections.risk && Array.isArray(sections.risk.top_holdings))
      ? sections.risk.top_holdings
      : [];

    const baseCurrency = profile.base_currency || "USD";
    const portfolioName = profile.display_name || "Portfolio";
    const country = profile.country || "N/A";

    const formatMoney = (value, currency) => {
      const amount = Number(value || 0);
      try {
        return new Intl.NumberFormat("pt-BR", {
          style: "currency",
          currency: currency || "USD",
          maximumFractionDigits: 2
        }).format(amount);
      } catch (_e) {
        return `${amount.toFixed(2)} ${currency || ""}`.trim();
      }
    };

    const sumValues = (obj) => Object.values(obj || {}).reduce((acc, raw) => {
      const value = Number(raw || 0);
      return acc + (Number.isFinite(value) ? value : 0);
    }, 0);

    const totalByCurrency = sumValues(currencySplit);
    const holdingsCount = topHoldings.length;
    const timelineCount = timeline.length;

    const overview = document.getElementById("rk-overview");
    overview.innerHTML = `
      <h2>Overview</h2>
      <div class="rk-grid">
        <article class="rk-card">
          <h3>Portfolio</h3>
          <div class="rk-metric">${portfolioName}</div>
        </article>
        <article class="rk-card">
          <h3>Base Currency</h3>
          <div class="rk-metric">${baseCurrency}</div>
        </article>
        <article class="rk-card">
          <h3>Country</h3>
          <div class="rk-metric">${country}</div>
        </article>
        <article class="rk-card">
          <h3>Holdings (Top List)</h3>
          <div class="rk-metric">${holdingsCount}</div>
        </article>
        <article class="rk-card">
          <h3>Total (Currency Split Sum)</h3>
          <div class="rk-metric">${formatMoney(totalByCurrency, baseCurrency)}</div>
        </article>
        <article class="rk-card">
          <h3>Snapshot Count</h3>
          <div class="rk-metric">${timelineCount}</div>
        </article>
      </div>
    `;

    const renderBars = (targetId, data, currency) => {
      const target = document.getElementById(targetId);
      const entries = Object.entries(data || {})
        .map(([label, raw]) => [label, Number(raw || 0)])
        .filter(([, value]) => Number.isFinite(value))
        .sort((a, b) => b[1] - a[1]);

      if (!entries.length) {
        target.innerHTML = `<p class="rk-note">No data available.</p>`;
        return;
      }

      const max = entries[0][1] || 1;
      const rows = entries.map(([label, value]) => {
        const pct = Math.max(0, Math.min(100, (value / max) * 100));
        return `
          <div class="rk-row">
            <div class="rk-row-head">
              <strong>${label}</strong>
              <span>${formatMoney(value, currency)}</span>
            </div>
            <div class="rk-track"><div class="rk-fill" style="width:${pct}%"></div></div>
          </div>
        `;
      }).join("");

      target.innerHTML = `<div class="rk-bars">${rows}</div>`;
    };

    const renderTimeline = () => {
      const target = document.getElementById("rk-timeline");
      if (!timeline.length) {
        target.innerHTML = `<p class="rk-note">No timeline snapshots available.</p>`;
        return;
      }

      const values = timeline.map((row) => Number(row.portfolio_value_base || 0));
      const cleanValues = values.filter((v) => Number.isFinite(v));
      if (!cleanValues.length) {
        target.innerHTML = `<p class="rk-note">No numeric timeline values available.</p>`;
        return;
      }

      const width = 900;
      const height = 260;
      const pad = 28;
      const min = Math.min(...cleanValues);
      const max = Math.max(...cleanValues);
      const range = max - min || 1;
      const points = cleanValues.map((value, i) => {
        const x = pad + (i * (width - pad * 2)) / Math.max(cleanValues.length - 1, 1);
        const y = height - pad - ((value - min) / range) * (height - pad * 2);
        return `${x},${y}`;
      }).join(" ");

      const firstTs = timeline[0].timestamp || "n/a";
      const lastTs = timeline[timeline.length - 1].timestamp || "n/a";
      target.innerHTML = `
        <svg viewBox="0 0 ${width} ${height}" width="100%" role="img" aria-label="Portfolio timeline">
          <rect x="0" y="0" width="${width}" height="${height}" fill="#ffffff" />
          <line x1="${pad}" y1="${height - pad}" x2="${width - pad}" y2="${height - pad}" stroke="#cbd5e1" />
          <line x1="${pad}" y1="${pad}" x2="${pad}" y2="${height - pad}" stroke="#cbd5e1" />
          <polyline points="${points}" fill="none" stroke="#0284c7" stroke-width="3" />
        </svg>
        <p class="rk-note">
          From <strong>${firstTs}</strong> to <strong>${lastTs}</strong> |
          min: ${formatMoney(min, baseCurrency)} | max: ${formatMoney(max, baseCurrency)}
        </p>
      `;
    };

    const renderTopHoldings = () => {
      const target = document.getElementById("rk-top-holdings");
      if (!topHoldings.length) {
        target.innerHTML = `<p class="rk-note">No holdings available.</p>`;
        return;
      }

      const rows = topHoldings.map((item) => `
        <tr>
          <td>${item.label || item.id || "unknown"}</td>
          <td>${item.id || "n/a"}</td>
          <td>${formatMoney(item.amount || 0, baseCurrency)}</td>
        </tr>
      `).join("");

      target.innerHTML = `
        <table class="rk-table">
          <thead>
            <tr>
              <th>Label</th>
              <th>ID</th>
              <th>Amount (${baseCurrency})</th>
            </tr>
          </thead>
          <tbody>${rows}</tbody>
        </table>
      `;
    };

    renderTimeline();
    renderBars("rk-currency", currencySplit, baseCurrency);
    renderBars("rk-asset-type", assetTypeBreakdown, baseCurrency);
    renderBars("rk-geo", geography, baseCurrency);
    renderTopHoldings();
  })();
</script>
```
